sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95013" key="sklhrotuxh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκληρο-τῠχής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n95013.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having hard luck</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:89:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">89.12</biblScope></bibl>, Salač and Škorpil <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Několik Archeol.Památek z Východniho Bulharska</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">57</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Mesembria</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
